scripts.deploy:frontend: aws s3 sync ../apps/mobile/dist/web s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name VoiceAgentFrontendStack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`BucketName`].OutputValue' --output text) --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name VoiceAgentFrontendStack --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`DistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) --paths '/*'
